abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: Dark Garden's Horse
abilities.text: This model cannot gain enemy tokens.

abilities.name: Demise (Death Defied)
abilities.text: Once per game. When this model is killed, this model may drain a (soulstone) to heal 8 and have allies within (n) 8" gain a Shielded token.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Ethereal Reaping
actions.costs_and_restrictions: While unengaged, this action may draw range and LoS from friendly models with Shielded tokens.

triggers.name: Ring of Fire
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)3" of the target gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Lead the Flock
triggers.text: This action must have drawn range from another friendly model. The model range was drawn from may declare an attack action.

triggers.name: Engulfing Flame
triggers.text: Models within (aura)3" of the target resolve their Burning tokens. The target is dealt damage equal to the number of Burning tokens resolved.

actions.name: Fire's Fury
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target Pyre marker that has not been targeted by this action this activation.
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura)2" of target must pass a TN 14 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Strength from the Grave
triggers.text: An ally within 6" of the target gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Forgotten Dead
triggers.text: Summon a Corpse Candle in base contact with the target, then remove the target.
